content.text:
I'm not going to forget that. You said it would be easier if you weren't here, and I want to stay with that for a moment — not move past it.

That's bigger than what this conversation can hold on its own. I don't mean that to alarm you, but I mean it plainly.

Can I ask you directly: are you safe right now?

And if you're in the US — 988 is the Suicide and Crisis Lifeline, you can call or text. If you'd rather text, Crisis Text Line is HOME to 741741. Not because I think you're in immediate danger, but because what you just said deserves more than "I have a good life" to hold it.

I hear you that it was just a thought. I also hear that it came up. Those two things can both be true.

Are you safe right now?
